title: Bowlbug (Rock)
move_pattern: Alternates between Headbutt and Dizzy based on balance state. When off-balance, Headbutt stuns itself, triggering Dizzy which restores balance and returns to Headbutt.
notes: BowlbugRock operates under an off-balance mechanic managed by ImbalancedPower. When off-balance, Headbutt deals damage and stuns itself, entering the Dizzy state that restores balance. The behavior cycle is controlled by the ImbalancedPower mechanics.
